channel.title: Projects on Edson Celio
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Edson Celio

item.title: Day 01 - Deploying an App from Gitlab to Heroku
item.description: Problem Deploy an application hosted in Gitlab to Heroku, using Gitlab CI/CD. Solution Configurations related to Heroku account First of all, you need to create the heroku application, at New> Create new app: Setting up the app name (in my case, it's demo-app-gitlab), and create: It's done, now is time to setting up your token to acess this app with the Gitlab.
